description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a predominantly red fuselage accented by white stripes on the nose and tail. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted at a mid-level position on the fuselage, giving the aircraft a dynamic, agile appearance. The cockpit is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage and likely designed for a single pilot. Twin vertical stabilizers are mounted at the rear, angled outward in a V-tail configuration, adding to the aircraft's distinctive silhouette. The engines are integrated into the rear fuselage, with intakes visible just ahead of the tail section. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, suggesting a metal or composite construction typical of high-performance aircraft.
description: A red, swept-wing airplane with a V-tail, forward enclosed cockpit, and rear-mounted engines, featuring a glossy finish and white accent stripes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan with swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mid-mounted wings, streamlined fuselage, and the V-tail configuration at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin outward-angled vertical stabilizers and the engine exhausts integrated into the tail section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the wing sweep, cockpit placement, and the distinctive tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with twin outward-angled vertical stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, not visibly extended in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy.
